stories.title: Valero Texas Open Round 1 Suspended by Weather — Masters Bubble Players Wait

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
Round 1 at the Valero Texas Open was suspended by weather.

Play is back on Friday — and with the Masters 6 days away, every shot matters.

Win here. Go to Augusta. Simple as that.

#GolfFanrecap #ValeroTexasOpen #PGATour

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
Valero Texas Open leaderboard is still forming — weather pushed Round 1 into Friday.

Fowler. Finau. Zalatoris. Kim. Horschel.

All of them need a win to get into the Masters.

This is the most dramatic final qualifier in golf.

#GolfFanrecap #ValeroTexasOpen #Masters

article.headline: Valero Texas Open Round 1 Suspended by Weather — Final Masters Invite Hangs in Balance

stories.title: Masters 6 Days Away — McIlroy's Bid to Be First Back-to-Back Champion Since Tiger

x_posts.label: Post 2-1
x_posts.text:
Rory McIlroy is 6 days from defending his Masters title.

If he wins again, he'll be the first back-to-back Masters champion since Tiger Woods in 2002.

No one has done it in 24 years. McIlroy is coming for history.

#GolfFanrecap #RoryMcIlroy #TheMasters

x_posts.label: Post 2-2
x_posts.text:
McIlroy missed the Players Championship with a back injury.

He's been resting instead of playing — preserving himself for Augusta.

Defending champion. 24-year gap to fill. April 9.

#GolfFanrecap #TheMasters #McIlroy

article.headline: McIlroy's Back-to-Back Masters Bid: Chasing History No One Has Touched in 24 Years

stories.title: Scheffler Eyes Third Masters Title — Can He Become Augusta's Most Dominant Modern Player?

x_posts.label: Post 3-1
x_posts.text:
Scottie Scheffler won the Masters in 2022.
Then again in 2024.

If he wins in 2026? That's three green jackets in five years.

The World No. 3 is the +550 favorite. And he loves Augusta.

#GolfFanrecap #ScottieScheffler #TheMasters

x_posts.label: Post 3-2
x_posts.text:
2022: Scheffler wins.
2024: Scheffler wins.
2026: ?

The even-year Masters pattern is real. Three green jackets in five years is historically rare.

Scheffler is the favorite for a reason.

#GolfFanrecap #TheMasters #Masters2026

article.headline: Scheffler at Augusta: Three Green Jackets in Five Years Would Put Him in Rare Company

stories.title: LPGA Aramco Championship — Korda Chasing First Tour Win Since Tournament of Champions

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
Nelly Korda leads the LPGA Tour in Strokes Gained.

She's been the best player on tour this spring. She's also been runner-up twice in a row — both times to Hyo Joo Kim.

Las Vegas is her chance to end the streak.

#GolfFanrecap #LPGA #NellyKorda

article.headline: Korda's Numbers Are Historic. Her Win Column Needs to Catch Up at the Aramco Championship.

stories.title: DeChambeau Enters Masters Week on Sizzling Two-Win LIV Streak

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
Bryson DeChambeau enters Masters week on a 2-tournament LIV win streak.

LIV Singapore. LIV South Africa (beat Rahm in a playoff).

5 career LIV wins. +1000 Masters odds.

Augusta in 6 days. He's locked in.

#GolfFanrecap #DeChambeau #TheMasters

article.headline: DeChambeau's LIV Win Streak Enters Masters Week: Two Titles, Five Career, One Goal

x_posts.label: Post 7
x_posts.text:
World Golf Rankings entering Masters week:

No. 1 — Tommy Fleetwood
No. 2 — Rory McIlroy
No. 3 — Scottie Scheffler
No. 4 — Cameron Young

The Spring reshuffle is complete. Augusta starts in 6 days.

#GolfFanrecap #GolfRankings #TheMasters
